title: Legal Market and Launch Tier Management
description: Platform-wide surface for managing legal markets, launch tiers, and market readiness dimensions. Source of truth is the claim-readiness-registry. Claim surface: shows full readiness detail including internal-only states. Deferred until country-payer readiness registry infrastructure exists. Pack sensitivity is country-regulatory.

dataSources.description: Market readiness dimensions, launch tiers, and country-payer readiness state.
